prose:
**Ethylene frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.
Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz`, single-point (no geometry relaxation at DFT).
SCF converged in 6 cycles; no warnings reported.
HOMO = −7.6155818 eV, LUMO = −0.17986527 eV → gap = 7.4357165 eV.

Reproducibility:
• Command:  
  `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpwvy_a498/live.json`  
• JSON output: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpwvy_a498/live.json`
